creator: kp@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to jcaplan from comment #0)
Your reproduction case does not show the problem on main.

I believe Gleb fixed this in https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=54712fc42350acb4991d8bd8604b08562660e962

The fix was never MFC'd. I'm not sure if there was a reason for this or not.
